dialogueChunks.intro: Please, {player_name}. Since {quest_origin}, {quest_threat_the} {quest_threat_has} made life unbearable. We have nowhere else to turn.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We need someone to {quest_action} at {quest_focus_the}. The {enemy_type_plural} have overrun the area {location_hint}, and they keep coming. Without clearing them out, {quest_stakes_human_the} will suffer.
dialogueChunks.outro: I know it is a lot to ask. But we are running out of time.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, thank the stars you are here. {quest_threat_The} {quest_threat_has} been claiming more of us each day, and we cannot hold on much longer.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We traced the problem back to {quest_focus_the}, but we lack the means to fix it. The {enemy_type_plural} have nested {location_hint} and they are growing bolder. {quest_ally} says we need them culled before anyone can get close enough to help.
dialogueChunks.outro: Please, {quest_stakes_the} cannot wait. We need this done before {quest_time_pressure}.

dialogueChunks.intro: Stranger, I have no pride left. {player_name}, {quest_threat_animate_the} {quest_threat_animate_has} been terrorizing {quest_focus_the} and we are powerless to stop it.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Someone needs to {quest_action} before we lose everything. The {enemy_type_plural} have been sighted {location_hint}. Kill enough of them and we might stand a chance.
dialogueChunks.outro: If {quest_stakes_the} {quest_stakes_is} taken, this settlement is finished. I will give you {quest_reward_hint} if you help us.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I know how this looks. A stranger begging at the roadside. But I promise you, the need is real.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Since {quest_origin}, {quest_threat_animate_the} {quest_threat_animate_has} driven us from {quest_focus_the} piece by piece. We tried to fight back ourselves, and people got hurt. The {enemy_type_plural} are still there {location_hint}, and {quest_stakes_the} grows weaker every day we do nothing.
dialogueChunks.outro: You would need to deal with the {enemy_type_plural} near {quest_focus_the}. I would not ask if there were anyone else.

dialogueChunks.intro: I sent for help weeks ago. No one came. Then I sent again. Nothing. You are the first person to even stop, {player_name}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_threat_The} appeared after {quest_origin} and brought the {enemy_type_plural} with it. They have been circling {quest_focus_the}, picking off anyone who ventures {location_hint}. {quest_stakes_human_The} {quest_stakes_human_is} trapped, and every night the creatures come closer.
dialogueChunks.outro: Hunt down the {enemy_type_plural} before they finish what they started. {quest_reward_hint} is all we can offer, but it is yours if you help.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I just came from {quest_focus_the}. It is bad. Worse than the rumors say.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The {enemy_type_plural} hit at dawn. They scattered the watch and tore through the outer buildings before anyone could mount a defense. {quest_ally} is organizing the survivors, but they cannot hold another assault. The creatures are regrouping {location_hint} right now.
dialogueChunks.outro: Strike them before they attack again. {quest_stakes_The} will not survive a second wave.
